meta.seoDescription: SDE-2 at HT Digital Streams – Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, Real-time Systems

hero.name: Anurag Singhal
hero.tagline: Building scalable, high-performance systems that power millions of users

about.bio: I'm a passionate Software Development Engineer with 2+ years of experience building high-impact backend systems. Currently SDE-2 at HT Digital Streams (Hindustan Times), where I architect real-time data pipelines, microservices, and APIs that serve millions of users daily.
about.bio2: I specialise in Java, Spring Boot, and reactive programming, with a track record of improving system performance, reducing latency, and driving revenue growth through technical innovation.

experience.title: SDE-2
bullets: Built a Real-Time Trade-Alert Notification feature with MoEngage integration — scheduler monitors live stock prices against trade recommendations, detects stop-loss/target-hit events, and pushes alerts asynchronously to a message queue. Achieved 40% increase in overall market traffic.
Enhanced the core Search API via migration to Atlas Search (improved relevance and reduced latency) and revamped the Market Dashboard — combined efforts drove a 25% increase in traffic.

experience.title: SDE-1
bullets: Revamped backend architecture with optimised APIs, Redis caching, and Elasticsearch — achieved 60% higher user engagement and supported peak 1.5 M daily traffic.
Led backend integration of IndiaBond and Dhan into LiveMint, enabling a new financial product vertical that contributed to a ₹1 Cr revenue increase.
Optimised real-time data streaming using Spring WebFlux and reactive programming, integrating Refinitiv, Morningstar & Dion providers — reduced latency by 40%.
Spearheaded development of an early alerting system to detect critical market fluctuations in real time, enhancing system robustness and team decision-making.

education.institution: Malaviya National Institute of Technology Jaipur

projects.name: eCommerceElite
projects.description: A full-stack e-commerce platform with responsive React UI, global state via Redux, and 15+ REST APIs in Node/Express for core commerce flows.
highlights: Responsive React UI with global state management via Redux
15+ REST APIs in Node/Express covering entire commerce flow
JWT-based authentication and PayPal integration for secure checkout

projects.name: Real-Time Market Intelligence Agent
projects.description: A real-time market monitoring prototype with WebSocket streaming, React dashboard, and an ML model for short-term price trend classification.
highlights: Real-time market monitoring via WebSockets + React dashboard
ML model (scikit-learn) with SMA/EMA/volatility features for trend classification

achievements: Solved 1500+ problems across LeetCode, GeeksForGeeks, and CodeStudio (2021–2024)
Secured 29th rank in CodeRush Coding Challenge – MNIT Jaipur (AlgoUniversity), 2023
Ranked in TOP-25 in GeeksForGeeks Institute Leaderboard, 2023
Global top rankings: 46th & 117th in CodeChef Starters; 703rd in GFG Weekly Contest 130 (2022–2023)
